explanations.1: This declares that the file is XML format version 1.0, which tells the computer how to read the rest of the file.
explanations.3: This enables colored output in the terminal when the linter runs, making errors easier to spot.
explanations.5: This 's' flag tells the linter to show a summary of how many errors it found at the end.
explanations.6: This 'p' flag tells the linter to display the full file path for each error, not just the filename.
